overview.description: The NEOS MSCI EAFE High Income ETF (NIHI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund invests in ETFs and/or stocks of any market capitalization from developed market countries, excluding North America. The fund aims to generate high monthly income from the premiums earned from call options and dividends. NIHI was launched on Sep 17, 2025 and is issued by Neos.
